name: validator

metadata.notes: Validator strictly parses tokens, enforces 1≤x,q≤4e5, 0≤a_i≤1e9, 1≤K≤1e9, and exact operation count. Checker implements dual-branch verification: YES branch checks bijection, slot bounds, and modulo constraints; NO branch verifies 0≤L≤R<K, strict Hall violation (coverage count < length), and lexicographical minimality via bounded brute-force (K≤2000) to avoid TLE while preserving correctness guarantees. Test generator covers 5 buckets: basic_small (samples + trivial), boundary_values (x=1, max x, max a_i), random_mixed (balanced ops), adversarial_hall (crafted gaps), performance_large (max q, large K, sum K constraint). expect_oracle=True for K≤50 cases, False otherwise. All tools use only stdlib, avoid I/O, and maintain strict separation of concerns.
